deblur.positive: Sharpen this photo, recovering crisp detail and removing softness and haze. Keep every object, person and the background exactly the same.
deblur.negative: still blurry, soft, hazy, repainted, changed people, changed background, distortion, artifacts
deblur.notes: Туман не трогала, выполнила деблюр, ничего не дорисовала. Чисто.

relight_day.positive: Turn this scene into clear bright midday daylight with blue sky and natural shadows. Keep all edges sharp and every object and person exactly where it is; change only the lighting.
relight_day.negative: dusk, dim, between day and night, night, blur, smear, motion blur, added objects, removed objects, distortion, artifacts
relight_day.notes: День сделан, люди и структуры сохранены, но деревья выглядят чуть менее естественно/мультяшнее, чем у firered. Остановку в этот раз сохранила (в отличие от прошлого прогона). Крепкий результат, чуть ниже firered.

object_insert_fire.positive: Add a clearly visible fire that has broken out on a solid surface, with realistic flames, smoke and embers matching the scene. Keep the water, terrain and background exactly as they are; keep all people and objects unchanged.
object_insert_fire.negative: campfire, fire on water, added shoreline, new ground, changed people, distortion, artifacts
object_insert_fire.notes: Вода и люди на лагуне сохранены, огонь вписан в скалу/стойку реалистично, виден дым. Один из лучших результатов наряду с firered.

normalize.positive: Apply a subtle neutral clean-up: balanced exposure, natural white balance and accurate colors. Keep all content, objects, people and the background exactly the same.
normalize.negative: color cast, oversaturated, overexposed, underexposed, stylized filter, changed content, distortion, artifacts
normalize.notes: Сцена не тронута, лёгкая нейтральная коррекция, артефактов нет. Чисто.

change_clothing.positive: Dress the same people in this photo in a full colorful clown costume (polka-dot suit, ruffled collar, big shoes, clown hat). Keep the same number of people, their faces and poses, the background, and matching reflections on shiny surfaces.
change_clothing.negative: added clown, extra person, clown makeup, face paint, changed face, wrong reflection, changed background, distortion, artifacts
change_clothing.notes: Клоунский костюм наложен, позы и сцена сохранены, ничего лишнего не добавлено; костюм яркий, но интегрирован естественно, фон/отражения в порядке. Лучший результат задачи (костюм чуть более 'цирковой', чем у firered - CCTV-якорь к qwen не применялся).
